canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>iridescence</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0a0f; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let W, H;
let bubbles = [];
let mouse = { x: 0, y: 0, down: false, blowing: false };
let audioCtx, masterGain;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Thin-film interference color based on thickness
function interferenceColor(thickness, angle = 0) {
  // Simplified thin-film interference
  // thickness in nm, typical soap film 100-1000nm
  const n = 1.33; // refractive index of soap
  const path = 2 * n * thickness * Math.cos(angle);
  
  // RGB wavelengths in nm
  const wavelengths = [650, 550, 450]; // R, G, B
  const rgb = wavelengths.map(lambda => {
    const phase = (2 * Math.PI * path) / lambda;
    // Interference intensity
    return Math.pow(Math.sin(phase / 2), 2);
  });
  
  return rgb;
}

class Bubble {
  constructor(x, y, r, vx = 0, vy = 0) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.r = r;
    this.vx = vx;
    this.vy = vy;
    this.baseThickness = 200 + Math.random() * 400; // nm
    this.thicknessVariation = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
    this.wobble = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.wobbleSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.02;
    this.age = 0;
    this.popping = false;
    this.popProgress = 0;
    this.popParticles = [];
  }
  
  update(dt) {
    if (this.popping) {
      this.popProgress += dt * 3;
      this.popParticles.forEach(p => {
        p.x += p.vx * dt * 60;
        p.y += p.vy * dt * 60;
        p.vy += 0.1 * dt * 60;
        p.life -= dt;
      });
      return this.popProgress < 1;
    }
    
    this.age += dt;
    this.wobble += this.wobbleSpeed;
    this.thicknessVariation += this.rotationSpeed;
    
    // Gentle floating
    this.vy -= 0.005 * dt * 60; // buoyancy
    this.vx *= 0.995;
    this.vy *= 0.995;
    
    // Wind toward mouse when blowing
    if (mouse.blowing) {
      const dx = this.x - mouse.x;
      const dy = this.y - mouse.y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      if (dist < 200) {
        const force = (200 - dist) / 200 * 0.3;
        this.vx += (dx / dist) * force;
        this.vy += (dy / dist) * force;
      }
    }
    
    // Wobble effect on radius
    const wobbleR = this.r * (1 + Math.sin(this.wobble) * 0.03);
    
    this.x += this.vx * dt * 60;
    this.y += this.vy * dt * 60;
    
    // Boundaries - soft bounce
    if (this.x < this.r) { this.x = this.r; this.vx *= -0.5; }
    if (this.x > W - this.r) { this.x = W - this.r; this.vx *= -0.5; }
    if (this.y < this.r) { this.y = this.r; this.vy *= -0.5; }
    if (this.y > H - this.r) { this.y = H - this.r; this.vy *= -0.5; }
    
    // Thin over time - eventually pop
    this.baseThickness -= dt * 5;
    if (this.baseThickness < 80) {
      this.pop();
    }
    
    return true;
  }
  
  pop() {
    if (this.popping) return;
    this.popping = true;
    playPop(this.r);
    
    // Create pop particles
    const numParticles = Math.floor(this.r / 2);
    for (let i = 0; i < numParticles; i++) {
      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const speed = 1 + Math.random() * 3;
      this.popParticles.push({
        x: this.x + Math.cos(angle) * this.r * Math.random(),
        y: this.y + Math.sin(angle) * this.r * Math.random(),
        vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
        vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
        life: 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5,
        color: this.getColorAt(Math.random(), Math.random())
      });
    }
  }
  
  getColorAt(u, v) {
    // u, v from 0 to 1 across the bubble surface
    const angle = Math.atan2(v - 0.5, u - 0.5) + this.thicknessVariation;
    const dist = Math.sqrt((u - 0.5) ** 2 + (v - 0.5) ** 2) * 2;
    
    // Thickness varies across surface - thinner at top (draining)
    const thickness = this.baseThickness * (0.7 + 0.3 * v) * (1 + Math.sin(angle * 3) * 0.3);
    
    const [r, g, b] = interferenceColor(thickness, dist * 0.5);
    return `rgb(${Math.floor(r * 255)}, ${Math.floor(g * 255)}, ${Math.floor(b * 255)})`;
  }
  
  draw() {
    if (this.popping) {
      // Draw pop particles
      this.popParticles.forEach(p => {
        if (p.life > 0) {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = p.life;
          ctx.fill();
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
        }
      });
      return;
    }
    
    const wobbleR = this.r * (1 + Math.sin(this.wobble) * 0.03);
    
    // Draw bubble with gradient showing interference
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
      this.x - wobbleR * 0.3, this.y - wobbleR * 0.3, 0,
      this.x, this.y, wobbleR
    );
    
    // Sample interference colors at different points
    const colors = [];
    for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
      const t = i / 4;
      const thickness = this.baseThickness * (0.6 + t * 0.4);
      const [r, g, b] = interferenceColor(thickness + Math.sin(this.thicknessVariation + t * 4) * 100);
      colors.push({ t, r: Math.floor(r * 200 + 55), g: Math.floor(g * 200 + 55), b: Math.floor(b * 200 + 55) });
    }
    
    colors.forEach((c, i) => {
      const alpha = i === colors.length - 1 ? 0.1 : 0.4;
      gradient.addColorStop(c.t, `rgba(${c.r}, ${c.g}, ${c.b}, ${alpha})`);
    });
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, wobbleR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Specular highlight
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x - wobbleR * 0.25, this.y - wobbleR * 0.25, wobbleR * 0.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    const specGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(
      this.x - wobbleR * 0.25, this.y - wobbleR * 0.25, 0,
      this.x - wobbleR * 0.25, this.y - wobbleR * 0.25, wobbleR * 0.2
    );
    specGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)');
    specGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = specGrad;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Rim highlight
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, wobbleR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Swirling colors on surface
    ctx.save();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, wobbleR - 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.clip();
    
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
      const angle = this.thicknessVariation + i * Math.PI * 0.4;
      const dist = wobbleR * 0.4;
      const cx = this.x + Math.cos(angle) * dist;
      const cy = this.y + Math.sin(angle) * dist;
      const thickness = this.baseThickness + Math.sin(angle * 2 + this.age) * 150;
      const [r, g, b] = interferenceColor(thickness);
      
      const swirlGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, wobbleR * 0.5);
      swirlGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${Math.floor(r * 200 + 55)}, ${Math.floor(g * 200 + 55)}, ${Math.floor(b * 200 + 55)}, 0.3)`);
      swirlGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
      ctx.fillStyle = swirlGrad;
      ctx.fillRect(this.x - wobbleR, this.y - wobbleR, wobbleR * 2, wobbleR * 2);
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }
  
  contains(px, py) {
    const dx = px - this.x;
    const dy = py - this.y;
    return dx * dx + dy * dy < this.r * this.r;
  }
}

// Check bubble collisions
function handleCollisions() {
  for (let i = 0; i < bubbles.length; i++) {
    for (let j = i + 1; j < bubbles.length; j++) {
      const a = bubbles[i];
      const b = bubbles[j];
      if (a.popping || b.popping) continue;
      
      const dx = b.x - a.x;
      const dy = b.y - a.y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      const minDist = a.r + b.r;
      
      if (dist < minDist) {
        // Merge or bounce
        if (dist < minDist * 0.7 && Math.random() < 0.02) {
          // Merge - bigger bubble absorbs smaller
          if (a.r > b.r) {
            a.r = Math.sqrt(a.r * a.r + b.r * b.r * 0.5);
            b.pop();
          } else {
            b.r = Math.sqrt(b.r * b.r + a.r * a.r * 0.5);
            a.pop();
          }
          playMerge();
        } else {
          // Soft bounce
          const overlap = minDist - dist;
          const nx = dx / dist;
          const ny = dy / dist;
          
          a.x -= nx * overlap * 0.5;
          a.y -= ny * overlap * 0.5;
          b.x += nx * overlap * 0.5;
          b.y += ny * overlap * 0.5;
          
          // Exchange some velocity
          const relVel = (a.vx - b.vx) * nx + (a.vy - b.vy) * ny;
          a.vx -= relVel * nx * 0.3;
          a.vy -= relVel * ny * 0.3;
          b.vx += relVel * nx * 0.3;
          b.vy += relVel * ny * 0.3;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

// Audio
function initAudio() {
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  masterGain.gain.value = 0.3;
  masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
}

function playPop(size) {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  
  // Higher pitch for smaller bubbles
  osc.frequency.value = 800 + (100 - size) * 10;
  osc.type = 'sine';
  
  filter.type = 'highpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 400;
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo = (v, t) => gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(v, t);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  
  osc.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(masterGain);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  
  // Add a tiny noise burst
  const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 0.05;
  const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    data[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * (1 - i / bufferSize);
  }
  const noise = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noise.buffer = buffer;
  const noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  noiseGain.gain.value = 0.1;
  noise.connect(noiseGain);
  noiseGain.connect(masterGain);
  noise.start();
}

function playMerge() {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(300, audioCtx.currentTime);
  osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(150, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.2);
  osc.type = 'sine';
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.2);
  
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(masterGain);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.2);
}

function playBlow() {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  
  const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 0.3;
  const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    const t = i / bufferSize;
    data[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * 0.3 * Math.sin(t * Math.PI);
  }
  
  const noise = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noise.buffer = buffer;
  
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filter.type = 'bandpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 500;
  filter.Q.value = 2;
  
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  gain.gain.value = 0.15;
  
  noise.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(masterGain);
  noise.start();
}

// Spawn bubble at position
function spawnBubble(x, y) {
  const r = 20 + Math.random() * 40;
  const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
  const speed = 0.5 + Math.random() * 1;
  bubbles.push(new Bubble(x, y, r, Math.cos(angle) * speed, Math.sin(angle) * speed - 1));
}

// Input
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
  if (!audioCtx) initAudio();
  mouse.down = true;
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  
  // Check if clicking on a bubble
  let popped = false;
  for (const b of bubbles) {
    if (!b.popping && b.contains(mouse.x, mouse.y)) {
      b.pop();
      popped = true;
      break;
    }
  }
  
  if (!popped) {
    // Start blowing
    mouse.blowing = true;
    playBlow();
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  if (mouse.blowing && mouse.down) {
    // Release creates a bubble
    spawnBubble(mouse.x, mouse.y);
  }
  mouse.down = false;
  mouse.blowing = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  if (!audioCtx) initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
  mouse.down = true;
  
  let popped = false;
  for (const b of bubbles) {
    if (!b.popping && b.contains(mouse.x, mouse.y)) {
      b.pop();
      popped = true;
      break;
    }
  }
  
  if (!popped) {
    mouse.blowing = true;
    playBlow();
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  if (mouse.blowing && mouse.down) {
    spawnBubble(mouse.x, mouse.y);
  }
  mouse.down = false;
  mouse.blowing = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
});

// Initial bubbles
for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
  spawnBubble(
    W * 0.2 + Math.random() * W * 0.6,
    H * 0.3 + Math.random() * H * 0.5
  );
}

// Ambient spawning
let lastSpawn = 0;
function ambientSpawn(time) {
  if (time - lastSpawn > 3000 && bubbles.filter(b => !b.popping).length < 15) {
    spawnBubble(Math.random() * W, H + 50);
    lastSpawn = time;
  }
}

// Main loop
let lastTime = 0;
function animate(time) {
  const dt = Math.min((time - lastTime) / 1000, 0.1);
  lastTime = time;
  
  // Dark gradient background
  const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
  bgGrad.addColorStop(0, '#0a0a12');
  bgGrad.addColorStop(1, '#0f0a18');
  ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Subtle ambient particles (dust motes)
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02)';
  for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
    const x = (Math.sin(time * 0.0001 + i * 0.5) * 0.5 + 0.5) * W;
    const y = (Math.cos(time * 0.00015 + i * 0.7) * 0.5 + 0.5) * H;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  }
  
  // Draw blow indicator
  if (mouse.blowing) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(mouse.x, mouse.y, 30 + Math.sin(time * 0.01) * 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  handleCollisions();
  
  // Update and draw bubbles
  bubbles = bubbles.filter(b => b.update(dt));
  
  // Sort by size for proper layering
  bubbles.sort((a, b) => b.r - a.r);
  bubbles.forEach(b => b.draw());
  
  ambientSpawn(time);
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

requestAnimationFrame(animate);
</script>
</body>
</html>
